subject: Order follow-up
body:
Hi team,

I am reaching out regarding my recent order #11234. The invoice shows a charge of $450, but I recall the quoted amount being $400. Could you please verify this discrepancy? Additionally, given the inconvenience, I would appreciate if you could offer a discount on my next order.

Looking forward to your response.

Best,
Alice Chen

subject: Shipping delay
body:
Hello,

I placed an order last week and the tracking still shows 'label created'. Can you please provide a status update?

Thanks,
David
